steps.title: Identify what x and y represent
steps.content: From the problem, $x$ is the number of hours spent on consultations and $y$ is the number of hours drafting garden plans. The total earnings are $1,472.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficients by units
steps.content: In $72x+94y=1{,}472$, each term must have units of dollars. Since $x$ is consultation hours, the coefficient $72$ is the consultation hourly rate: $72 per hour.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content: The credited option says the architect earned $72 per hour from consultations, which matches the coefficient of $x$. A is correct.
